base_evidence.title: Thermodynamics and an Introduction to Thermostatistics
base_evidence.excerpt: Standard exposition of entropy as a state function and the second law.

base_evidence.title: Statistical Mechanics
base_evidence.source: Pathria, R.K. and Beale, P.D. (2011) Academic Press
base_evidence.excerpt: Canonical reference for Boltzmann and Gibbs entropy formulations.

base_evidence.title: Quantum Computation and Quantum Information
base_evidence.source: Nielsen, M.A. and Chuang, I.L. (2000) Cambridge University Press
base_evidence.excerpt: Introduces von Neumann entropy and entanglement entropy.

base_evidence.title: A Mathematical Theory of Communication
base_evidence.source: Shannon, C.E. (1948) Bell System Technical Journal

base_evidence.title: Information Theory and Statistical Mechanics
base_evidence.excerpt: Connects entropy maximization with statistical mechanics.

base_evidence.title: Uber die Beziehung zwischen dem zweiten Hauptsatze der mechanischen Warmetheorie und der Wahrscheinlichkeitsrechnung
base_evidence.excerpt: Original source behind the logarithmic microstate formula.

base_evidence.title: Elements of Information Theory
base_evidence.source: Cover, T. and Thomas, J. (2006) Wiley
base_evidence.excerpt: Canonical treatment of entropy, mutual information, and coding theorems.

base_evidence.title: An Introduction to Kolmogorov Complexity and Its Applications
base_evidence.source: Li, M. and Vitanyi, P. (2008) Springer
base_evidence.excerpt: Reference on shortest descriptions and incompressibility.
